thesis: Strong Q1 2026 earnings beat: EPS $0.60 vs $0.42 expected (+43%), revenue $1.01B vs $960M estimate. Raised full-year 2026 revenue guidance to $4.30-4.34B (from $4.06-4.10B) and EPS to $2.36-2.44. Strong Buy consensus from 31 of 33 analysts, avg PT $204.82. Cloud observability and monitoring is essential AI-era infrastructure with sticky enterprise contracts. Goldman Sachs maintains Sell at $139 (outlier). Hold for 3-6 months.

Madrigal Pharmaceuticals — Rezdiffra (resmetirom) is the first FDA-approved treatment for MASH (metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis). Q1 2026 Rezdiffra net sales +127% YoY to $311.3M. Consensus 2026 full-year sales $1.52B. Strong Buy consensus from 13 analysts, avg PT $671.58 (33% upside from $505). Large addressable market (estimated 16-20M MASH patients in the US), accelerating physician adoption. Key risk: GLP-1 competition and payer pushback on pricing. Long-term hold.

Visa is the world's largest payment network with 4.9B credentials and 53% profit margins. Revenue $40B (+11% YoY). Payment volumes are inflation-resilient — higher nominal prices actually increase Visa's transaction revenue. Strong Buy consensus from 21 analysts, avg PT $387.25 (19.6% upside). Acts as a financial infrastructure monopoly not exposed to credit risk. Entry at CPI-driven market weakness. 12-month hold target.
notes: WARNING: Trailing stop order FAILED due to Alpaca paper trading API limitation (cannot place stop while buy order pending). Position has NO stop-loss protection. Must manually verify and add stop at next session.
